instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: yo this app is trash it keeps crashing
output: I'm sorry the app keeps crashing. I can help troubleshoot the issue and collect the details needed to resolve it.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: your stupid login system broke again
output: Thank you for reaching out. I'm sorry the login system is not working as expected. I can help troubleshoot the issue and gather the details needed to resolve it.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: this is the third time i had to call about the same problem
output: I sincerely apologize that this issue has required multiple contacts. I understand how frustrating that must be, and I want to resolve it for you today.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: nobody ever gets back to me when i leave a message
output: I'm sorry for the delay in our follow-up. I want to make sure your concern is addressed promptly and will personally ensure you receive a response today.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: the shipping was so slow and now the package is damaged
output: I apologize for the shipping delay and the condition of your package upon arrival. I would like to arrange a replacement and review the shipping process to prevent this from happening again.

instruction: Convert this informal note into a professional email.
input: tell mark the thing is late again
output:
Hi Mark,

I wanted to let you know that the item is running behind schedule again. I will keep you updated as soon as I have more information and a revised timeline.

Apologies for any inconvenience this may cause.

instruction: Convert this informal note into a professional email.
input: sarah needs to fix the report before friday or were screwed
output:
Hi Sarah,

I wanted to flag that the report needs to be finalized before Friday to meet our deadline. Please let me know if you need any support in completing it, and I am happy to help.

Thank you for your attention to this.

instruction: Convert this informal note into a professional email.
input: can someone pls look at this bug its been 2 weeks
output:
Hi team,

I wanted to follow up on the bug that was reported approximately two weeks ago. I would appreciate an update on its current status and expected resolution timeline.

Please let me know if any additional information from my end would be helpful.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: i waited 45 minutes on hold just to get disconnected
output: I sincerely apologize for the extended wait time and for the call disconnecting before your issue was resolved. I want to make sure you receive the support you need without further inconvenience.

instruction: Rewrite this customer complaint professionally.
input: the product i got looks nothing like what was on the website
output: I'm sorry the product you received does not match what was shown on our website. I would like to review your order and arrange either a replacement or a full refund based on your preference.
